news.title: 5 High-Yield Dividend Stocks Yielding 5% or More to Buy in July
news.summary: Long rates are stubborn, dividend growth has stalled at many blue chips, and the window for genuine 5%-plus yields with solid cash flow coverage is narrowing fast. These five names still clear the bar, but each carries a risk that income investors need to weigh before buying.
